title: bromus rigidus subsp. ambigens
intro: Bromus rigidus subsp. ambigens, also known as the rigid brome or inland brome, is a subspecies of grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Bromus rigidus subsp. ambigens include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
